case_title: MACKIN, JOHN VS DEVOGEL, RON et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,576.00 FILED BY MACKIN, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT DEVOGEL, RON BRITISH MOTOR CAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-12-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DEVOGEL, RON

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACKIN, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEVOGEL, RON BRITISH MOTOR CAR $2,576.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,628.00, DEFENDANT FTA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT DEVOGEL, RON HEARING SET FOR JUN-27-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLAINTIFF FILED A DECLARATION ADDING ANOTHER DEFT, BRITISH MOTOR CAR DISTRIBUTORS, LTD.
INFORMED THE PLTF THAT THERE IS ALREADY JUDGEMENT AND TO GO TO ACCESS CENTER FOR ADVICE ON HOW TO ADD A NEW NAME TO THE JUDGEMENT.
DECLARATION TO ADD A NEW NAME TO THE JUDGEMENT IS FILED ONLY.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUN-27-2005, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION ***-**-****, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-19-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DEVOGEL, RON BRITISH MOTOR CAR CASE DISMISSED DUE TO SPLIT CLAIM. SEE CASE # 810505. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR DAMAGES IS CONSOLIDATED INTO CASE # 812505. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
